title: How To Win A Pub Quiz
description: Part stand-up, part actual pub quiz. Quick-witted quizmaster Alex Love is back in Brighton with more trivia to split the audience into teams to compete for prizes in this highly interactive hour show. Expect facts, niche references, controversy over points, and probably squid. "A Fringe cult smash... outstripping some of the festival’s top-rated comedians in terms of both quality and quantity of laughter." ***** - BroadwayBaby.com "It is hilarious... Love appears to be the epitome of those times you are in the shower thinking, 'Oh, it would have been really cool if I had said THAT'." - ArtMurmurs.NZ "That the energy and humour are maintained throughout the show is testament to Love’s ability to work an audience." - DenOfGeek.com

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
